login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard
login.successMessage: Account created successfully! Please check your email ({email}) for a verification link before signing in.
login.errorDefault: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: Check your email! We've sent a password reset link to {email}.
forgotPassword.error: Failed to request password reset. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been successfully reset. Redirecting to login...

errors.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long

loading.title: Verifying Email
loading.description: Please wait while we verify your email address...

success.title: Email Verified!
success.description: Your email address has been successfully verified. Redirecting to dashboard...

error.title: Verification Failed
error.tryAgain: Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

errors.noId: Invalid verification link. No verification ID provided.
errors.default: Email verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.

landing.headline: A solid foundation for <molten>forging</molten> applications
landing.sub: Idk what to write here yet

ddd.title: Business logic with one home
ddd.desc: Every rule is written once, inside aggregates and value objects in the domain layer. Custom lint rules fail the build when a boundary is crossed.

events.title: Reliable events between services
events.desc: Services talk through Kafka with a transactional outbox and an idempotent inbox: no lost events, no double processing.

observability.title: See everything from day one
observability.desc: Metrics, logs and traces flow into Grafana automatically. Every command, query and event is measured without extra code.

deployable.title: Laptop to production in one command
deployable.desc: One compose stack for dev, versioned images for prod, TLS handled by Caddy, and scripts that provision and deploy a fresh server.

agents.title: A codebase AI agents can navigate
agents.desc: Every feature has the same shape and the same place. Humans and coding agents always know where things go.

scaffold.title: New services in one command
scaffold.desc: The generator scaffolds a service with a working starter context and wires it into compose, Caddy and monitoring. Rename it and start building.

auth.panelTitle: Operate your services from one forge-lit cockpit
auth.panelFootnote: Secure session · token refresh · role-based access

dashboard.title: System Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Live health and event flow across the service.

analytics.title: User Activity
analytics.none: No activity yet — register a user and watch the events flow.

password.title: Change Password
password.success: Password updated. You'll be signed out shortly.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.failed: Failed to change password. Check your current password.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Manage users and the public notice.
admin.onlyDesc: You need the admin role to view this area.

confirmDelete.title: Delete user
confirmDelete.body: Permanently delete {email}? This cannot be undone.

motd.title: Message of the Day
motd.label: Notice content
motd.placeholder: Shown to every user on the console…
motd.help: Leave a heads-up for everyone (maintenance windows, releases…).
